title: ochrocarpos eugenioides
intro: Ochrocarpos eugenioides, also known as the Yellow Murraya, is a species of flowering plant in the citrus family Rutaceae, native to tropical regions of Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Ochrocarpos eugenioides include relief from fever, cold, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. Traditionally, the plant is used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be consumed or applied topically to reap its medicinal benefits.
